news.title: U.S.-Iran talks set to begin in Pakistani capital after delegations arrive
news.summary: Pakistan confirms arrival of Iran's parliament speaker and foreign minister ahead of talks with a U.S. delegation led by Vice President JD Vance.

news.title: Berkshire electric utility's court win could save it billions
news.summary: PacifiCorp court win could reduce wildfire damages by $1 billion or more. PacifiCorp won't reveal how much money it will save on wildfire damages.

news.title: How Kodak is trying to turn around its business after teetering on bankruptcy
news.summary: CEO Jim Continenza is determined to fuel Eastman Kodak's success. Kodak has seen its fair share of financial struggles, but Continenza says the company is on the right track.

news.title: Vibe check from inside one of AI industry's main events: 'Claude mania'
news.summary: At the HumanX conference in San Francisco this week, Anthropic's momentum was on everyone's lips. Anthropic is an app that allows users to share photos of themselves with other people.

news.title: Trump praises Palantir as stock has worst week in over a year and Iran conflict drags on
news.summary: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran. Palantir has not commented on the reports.

news.title: Are you a ‘HENRY’? Why 90% of financial advisers will waive their minimums to get your business.
news.summary: Most advisory firms’ $500,000 or $1 million thresholds are just branding tools. Here’s how to tell if you’re actually a good fit for their services.

news.title: We’re in our 70s with no heirs. I like donating $30,000 from our $700,000 IRA to charity — my husband disagrees. Who’s right?
news.summary: “Our income — Social Security, his VA disability and three pensions — covers all expenses,” she says. “Our Income — Social security, hisVA disability and 3 pensions — cover all expenses.”

news.title: ‘I plan to exit corporate life’: I’m 50 and have $400,000. My wife is a teacher. Can I retire at 55?
news.summary: “I would like to stop working in about five years to spend more time with our child and support my wife,” he said.

news.title: Here’s a look at the known damage to Gulf energy facilities as the U.S. and Iran meet for talks
news.summary: More than 60 energy facilities struck across at least nine countries in the Persian Gulf. Nearly six weeks of war in Middle East saw more than 60 facilities struck.

news.title: We asked our wedding guests to give money to St. Jude’s Children’s Hospital. Can we write off their donations?
news.summary: “There were substantial donations made,” says the mayor. “There’s been a lot of support.” “We’ve been very fortunate,’ the mayor adds.
